Live00:0002:2802:28 All videos5 exciting new technologies in 2026This video is part of: Centre for Frontier Technologies and InnovationFrom quantum-proof lattice cryptography, which uses ‘noise’ and deliberate errors to throw off hackers, to a solution to forever chemicals, here are 5 incredible new technologies at the forefront of innovation.Every year, the World Economic Forum selects 10 scientific advances poised to make a huge impact in the next 3-5 years. You can learn about them all in our new report, the Top 10 Emerging Technologies of 2026 Over June, we’ll explore what it takes to turn technological breakthroughs into real-world progress for industries, economies and people.
